Specific reasoning. Cite Article 3(8), Article 26, GDPR Article 26, or the CJEU decision (C-210/16 / C-25/17 / C-40/17) as relevant.

Show the YAML structure or doc paragraph that would correctly map.

## Source

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — current text would mislead a deployer about a binding obligation
- [ ] Material — current text is incomplete or imprecise but not misleading
- [ ] Editorial — current text is correct but could be clearer
